OUSG.aum_note: Product-specific Ethereum USD AUM is not established from the included public data package. The approximately USD 770 million figure cited in the article is global product AUM and must not be substituted for an Ethereum-only value.

bIB01.aum_note: Product-specific Ethereum USD AUM is not established from the included public data package; Backed product-suite AUM must not be substituted for bIB01 AUM.

_source.holder_and_transfer_metrics: Dune exports M2/M2-bis/M6 as described in 02_empirical/dune_queries.sql
_source.BUIDL_aum_ethereum_usd: Dune export M1 / public snapshot value retained from the measured package
_source.OUSG_aum_ethereum_usd: unestablished: source export not included in the public repository
_source.bIB01_aum_ethereum_usd: unestablished: product-suite AUM is not product-specific AUM
_source.policy: Null values are deliberate and must not be backfilled without a cited export and calculation.
